leads.company_description: Red Letter Travel is a United States-based luxury travel agency and Virtuoso member that provides personalized trip planning and white-glove concierge services. They serve discerning clients by creating custom itineraries, securing exclusive perks, and coordinating with on-ground partners to ensure comprehensive travel support.

leads.title: Owner, Managing Partner
leads.headline: Owner, Managing Partner
leads.company_description: Elli Travel Group is a United States-based boutique luxury travel agency that provides full-service, bespoke travel planning for individuals and groups. They specialize in 4-5 star hotel stays, adventure travel, expedition cruises, and escorted group tours, focusing on seamless logistics and exclusive amenities.

leads.title: Managing Director

They serve high-profile clients by leveraging deep supplier relationships to curate authentic, exclusive cultural tours, wildlife adventures, and family trips.

leads.title: Owner and Founder
leads.company_description: North Shore Travel LLC is a United States-based full-service luxury travel consultancy that designs personalized, exclusive vacation experiences for individuals, families, and groups. They provide concierge-style planning services that go beyond standard flight and hotel reservations to deliver comprehensive, worry-free travel itineraries.

leads.company_description: Timeless Tours Ltd is a United Kingdom-based tour operator and travel agency headquartered in Kent. Established in 2011, the company specializes in providing curated destination experiences and fully-organized travel services for their clients.

leads.title: CEO + Founder
leads.company_description: Travel Sommelier is a United States-based boutique luxury travel concierge specializing in bespoke private itineraries tailored to food, wine, and cultural interests. The company curates vineyard tours, gastronomy experiences, and exclusive property stays for discerning high-end clients across Europe, Africa, and beyond.

leads.title: Founder & CEO
leads.company_description: SmoothRed is a United Kingdom-based award-winning boutique wine tour operator with over 20 years of experience. The company specializes in bespoke luxury wine tasting holidays, culinary journeys, and corporate incentive trips across Europe's top wine regions including Bordeaux, Champagne, Tuscany, and the Douro Valley.

leads.title: Founder & Managing Director
leads.company_description: Oenotated Travel is a United States-based luxury boutique travel advisor and custom tour operator specializing in wine, culinary, and cultural experiences. The company offers private wine tours, vineyard visits, and culinary journeys across Europe's top wine regions including Spain, France, Italy, and Portugal.

leads.title: Chief Operating Officer
leads.company_description: Essenza Escapes is a United Kingdom-based boutique luxury travel planner and concierge service specializing in Italy. The company curates hand-inspected villas, tailored itineraries, and bespoke experiences in food and wine, art and culture, and wellness, with a focus on the Amalfi Coast and other premium Italian destinations.

leads.title: Head of Operations
leads.company_description: Privé Luxury Travel is a United Kingdom-based luxury travel agency and lifestyle management service specializing in bespoke itinerary planning for ultra-high-net-worth clients. The company provides VIP hotel partnerships, exclusive event access, and white-glove concierge services across global luxury destinations.
